cvIntro: Senior Backend & AI Engineer specializing in production APIs and applied AI systems. I design and ship scalable REST services, distributed backends, and reliable cloud infrastructure from architecture through deployment.
githubAbout:
I'm a **Senior Backend & AI Engineer** focused on production APIs and applied AI systems, bringing RAG pipelines and multi-agent workflows from prototype to stable production.

I bridge high-throughput backend architecture and intelligent LLM orchestration: production APIs, data pipelines, vector database integration, caching, auth, and agent lifecycle management.

Currently at **Keyrium Consulting**, I lead development of backend systems for high-concurrency enterprise APIs (Loyalty Rewards & Stock Trading) using **Node.js**, **TypeScript**, and **PostgreSQL**, including system design, CI/CD automation, cloud deployment, and testing (85% code coverage).

**Focus areas:** Scalable distributed architectures · LLM orchestration · RAG pipelines · Multi-agent workflows · Cloud & API optimization

**Stack:** Node.js · TypeScript · Python · PostgreSQL · AWS · RAG · Agentic AI

**Let's connect:** [okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com](mailto:okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com) · [Portfolio](https://epicnode.hostless.site) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/okeowoemmanuelm/)
linkedinAbout:
I'm a Senior Backend & AI Engineer based in Lagos State, Nigeria, specializing in production APIs and applied AI systems. I build scalable REST services, distributed backends, RAG pipelines, semantic search, and multi-agent workflows from prototype to reliable production.

My work spans high-throughput backend engineering and applied LLM orchestration: microservice APIs, data pipelines, vector database integration, caching, authentication, and agent lifecycle management.

Currently at Keyrium Consulting, I lead development of production-grade RESTful APIs for Loyalty Rewards and Stock Trading platforms using Node.js and TypeScript, including architecture, CI/CD automation, cloud deployment, and a testing framework with 85% code coverage.

Previously, I've improved API and database performance by 30–80% across fintech and platform backends, and built secure auth systems with JWT, OAuth 2.0, MFA, and RBAC.

Open to senior backend, software engineering, and production LLM system roles (hybrid or remote).

Portfolio: epicnode.hostless.site
Email: okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer

experience.description: Leading development of production-grade RESTful APIs for Loyalty Rewards and Stock Trading platforms using Node.js and TypeScript. experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Refactored and optimized database queries by adding targeted indexes and streamlining joins, achieving 40–60% faster query times with reduced latency. Streamlined the middleware stack to improve API throughput by 30–50%. Introduced Redis-backed caching and tuned cache headers for faster repeat reads on high-traffic endpoints.

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer
experience.description: Engineered the backend for a dynamic event management web platform enabling users to discover, RSVP to, and manage events seamlessly. Built RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, implemented JWT-based role authentication, integrated PayStack and PCI-DSS compliance, and optimized PostgreSQL schemas for secure, scalable performance under concurrent load.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Built server-side caching and cache-control tuning that reduced repeat asset load times on key routes by up to 80%. Delivered a multi-provider auth layer (JWT, OAuth 2.0, MFA) with RBAC and integrations for email, SMS, and push notifications. Connected backend APIs to the client app with stable contracts and responsive data flows.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer

Sharpened algorithmic problem-solving through intensive DSA workshops covering time complexity, optimization, and system design fundamentals.

experience.title: Web Developer
